extraction.notes: glampingbusiness.com/businesses-for-sale/ contains no listing data in its own DOM. All listings are served via a cross-origin iframe from uk.businessesforsale.com (URL: https://uk.businessesforsale.com/ukpartners/search/camping-and-caravan-parks-and-rv-parks-for-sale?drid=4u7orkvsxxvu). When navigated directly, that domain returns a Cloudflare 'Performing security verification' challenge (Ray ID: 9f95e0178f6fe912) and no listings are accessible. Zero price signals, zero listing-path anchors, and zero structured data found on the host page. The actual listing inventory belongs to uk.businessesforsale.com, not glampingbusiness.com.
